sentences.target: Der Himmel ist heute ganz blau.

translations.de: Der Himmel ist heute ganz blau.
translations.en: The sky is completely blue today.
translations.es: Hoy el cielo está completamente azul.
translations.fr: Le ciel est tout bleu aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi il cielo è completamente azzurro.
translations.pt: Hoje o céu está completamente azul.
translations.nl: De lucht is vandaag helemaal blauw.
translations.nb: Himmelen er helt blå i dag.
translations.sv: Himlen är helt blå i dag.
translations.da: Himlen er helt blå i dag.

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular masculine; determiner of the subject noun 'Himmel'.
Common noun, masculine, nominative singular; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Temporal adverb; sets the time frame of the clause.
Degree adverb; intensifies the predicate adjective 'blau'.
Predicate adjective, positive degree; predicative complement describing 'Himmel'.

sentences.target: Wolken ziehen langsam über den Himmel.

translations.de: Wolken ziehen langsam über den Himmel.
translations.en: Clouds are moving slowly across the sky.
translations.es: Las nubes se mueven lentamente por el cielo.
translations.fr: Les nuages se déplacent lentement dans le ciel.
translations.it: Le nuvole si muovono lentamente nel cielo.
translations.zh-Hans: 云朵正慢慢地飘过天空。
translations.pt: As nuvens estão se movendo devagar pelo céu.
translations.vi: Mây đang trôi chậm trên bầu trời.
translations.nl: Wolken drijven langzaam door de lucht.
translations.hu: A felhők lassan vonulnak az égen.
translations.hi: बादल धीरे-धीरे आसमान में चल रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Chmury powoli przesuwają się po niebie.
translations.nb: Skyene beveger seg sakte over himmelen.
translations.sv: Moln rör sig långsamt över himlen.
translations.ro: Norii se mișcă încet pe cer.
translations.cs: Mraky se pomalu pohybují po obloze.
translations.da: Skyerne bevæger sig langsomt over himlen.
translations.ja: 雲がゆっくり空を流れている。

tokens.explanation: Common noun, nominative plural; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 3rd person plural present; intransitive here with a directional PP.
Adverb of manner; modifies the verb 'ziehen'.
Preposition; with motion it governs the accusative and heads the PP 'über den Himmel'.
Definite article, accusative singular masculine; determiner of 'Himmel' as object of the preposition.
Common noun, masculine, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'über'.

sentences.target: Ich fotografiere den Himmel am Abend.

translations.de: Ich fotografiere den Himmel am Abend.
translations.en: I’m photographing the sky in the evening.
translations.es: Estoy fotografiando el cielo al atardecer.
translations.fr: Je prends des photos du ciel le soir.
translations.it: Sto fotografando il cielo di sera.
translations.pt: Estou fotografando o céu ao entardecer.
translations.vi: Tôi chụp ảnh bầu trời vào buổi tối.
translations.ar: أنا ألتقط صورًا للسماء في المساء.
translations.hi: मैं शाम को आसमान की फोटो खींच रहा हूँ.
translations.id: Aku memotret langit pada sore hari.
translations.ja: 夕方に空の写真を撮っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present; transitive, governs the direct object 'den Himmel'.
Definite article, accusative singular masculine; determiner of the direct object 'Himmel'.
Common noun, masculine, accusative singular; direct object of 'fotografiere'.
Preposition (contraction of 'an dem'); governs the dative and introduces the temporal PP.
Common noun, masculine, dative singular; object of the preposition 'am' (temporal complement).

sentences.target: Kinder malen den Himmel mit bunten Farben.
sentences.reading: /ˈkɪndɐ ˈmaːlən deːn ˈhɪməl mɪt ˈbʊntən ˈfaʁbən/

translations.de: Kinder malen den Himmel mit bunten Farben.
translations.ipa: /ˈkɪndɐ ˈmaːlən deːn ˈhɪməl mɪt ˈbʊntən ˈfaʁbən/
translations.en: Children are painting the sky with bright colors.
translations.es: Los niños pintan el cielo con colores vivos.
translations.fr: Les enfants colorient le ciel avec des couleurs vives.
translations.it: I bambini colorano il cielo con colori vivaci.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们用鲜艳的颜色画天空。
translations.yue: 小朋友用繽紛嘅顏色畫天空。
translations.pt: As crianças pintam o céu com cores vivas.
translations.he: ילדים מציירים את השמיים בצבעים עזים.
translations.vi: Trẻ em tô bầu trời bằng những màu sắc rực rỡ.
translations.nl: Kinderen tekenen de lucht met felle kleuren.
translations.hu: A gyerekek élénk színekkel festik az eget.
translations.hi: बच्चे चमकीले रंगों से आसमान रंग रहे हैं.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά ζωγραφίζουν τον ουρανό με έντονα χρώματα.
translations.nb: Barn maler himmelen med sterke farger.
translations.id: Anak-anak mewarnai langit dengan warna-warna cerah.
translations.sv: Barn målar himlen med starka färger.
translations.ro: Copiii colorează cerul cu culori vii.
translations.da: Børn maler himlen med klare farver.
translations.ja: 子どもたちが鮮やかな色で空を描いている。

tokens.explanation: Common noun, nominative plural; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 3rd person plural present; transitive, takes direct object 'den Himmel' and a PP of means.

Preposition governing the dative; introduces an instrumental/means PP.
Attributive adjective, dative plural (strong inflection), modifying 'Farben'.
Common noun, feminine, dative plural; object of the preposition 'mit'.
